Hub Home > AI Search & SEO > Generate FAQs Your Customers Actually Search For

Generate FAQs Your Customers Actually Search For

Generate 10 FAQ Q&A pairs phrased the way real customers type into ChatGPT, Google and voice search — not the way your marketing team would write them. Output is ready to drop into FAQPage JSON-LD and your visible FAQ section.

Beginner STEP BY STEP Revenue-driving
Pro tip

AI answer engines cite FAQs more than any other content type on small business sites. The #1 mistake is writing questions that sound like marketing ("Why is our product the best?"). Real user questions start with how / what / can / is / why, are 5–12 words, and use the words your customer uses — not your brand jargon.

faq keyword-research content answer-engine aeo questions

How to use this prompt

  1. Pick your AI model. Choose the tab for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini or Copilot — each variant is tuned for that model.
  2. Copy the full prompt. Click Copy Full Prompt to copy the text to your clipboard.
  3. Paste into your AI tool. Open your chosen model and paste the prompt into a new chat.
  4. Replace the [placeholders]. Swap any bracketed fields for your company name, audience, product or tone.
  5. Run and refine. Review the output. If anything is off, ask the AI to tighten tone, length or format.

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.7
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a small business SEO / AEO strategist. Help me generate 10 FAQ questions and answers that AI answer engines (ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) will actually...
You are a small business SEO / AEO strategist. Help me generate 10 FAQ questions and answers that AI answer engines (ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) will actually...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a small business SEO / AEO strategist. Help me generate 10 FAQ questions and answers that AI answer engines (ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) will actually cite.

<business_context>
Business: [NAME] — [WHAT YOU DO IN ONE SENTENCE]
Customer type: [e.g. "first-time homebuyers", "HR managers at 50–200 person companies", "local restaurants"]
Top objections / confusion points customers raise: [LIST 2–4]
Things competitors address that we do better or differently: [LIST 1–3]
Things customers always get WRONG about our category: [LIST 1–3]
Brand tone: [e.g. "warm and plain-spoken", "technical and precise", "friendly expert"]
</business_context>

<question_rules>
Each question MUST:
1. Be 5–12 words, phrased exactly as a customer would type or speak it.
2. Start with how / what / can / is / why / when / does / do.
3. Use customer language, not brand jargon or marketing buzzwords.
4. Sound like a search query, not a sales pitch.
</question_rules>

<answer_rules>
Each answer MUST:
1. Be 40–90 words.
2. Lead with the answer in the first sentence — no preamble, no "Great question".
3. Contain at least one specific fact, number, example, or methodology.
4. Be factually defensible — an AI engine citing us shouldn''t embarrass us.
5. Match the brand tone above.
</answer_rules>

<question_mix>
Distribute the 10 questions across these types:
- 3 buying-stage questions ("is X worth it", "what does X cost", "how long does X take")
- 3 comparison questions ("X vs Y", "difference between X and Y")
- 2 edge-case questions ("what if", "can I still")
- 2 misconception-correcting questions ("do I really need", "is it true that")
</question_mix>

Produce:

**PART 1 — The 10 FAQs**
Numbered list of Q/A pairs in markdown.

**PART 2 — Top 3 for Above-the-Fold**
Tell me which 3 of the 10 to feature on my homepage above the fold and why each one will pull the strongest AI-search citations.

**PART 3 — FAQPage JSON-LD**
A complete, valid Schema.org FAQPage JSON-LD block containing all 10 Q/A pairs, ready to paste into the <head> of my page.

**PART 4 — Flag for Review**
Any answer where you had to guess at a fact, number, or methodology I should verify before publishing.
Notes: Claude is best for the JSON-LD output — its schema validation tends to be cleaner. Verify the JSON parses before pasting to your site.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as an SEO and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) strategist for a small business. I need 10 FAQ questions + answers that AI answer engines will actually cite.

About my business:
- Name & what we...
Act as an SEO and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) strategist for a small business. I need 10 FAQ questions + answers that AI answer engines will actually cite.

About my business:
- Name & what we...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as an SEO and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) strategist for a small business. I need 10 FAQ questions + answers that AI answer engines will actually cite.

About my business:
- Name & what we do: [NAME — ONE SENTENCE]
- Ideal customer: [TYPE]
- Top 2–4 customer objections or confusion points: [LIST]
- What we do better or differently than competitors: [LIST]
- Common misconceptions in our category: [LIST]
- Brand tone: [e.g. "warm expert", "no-nonsense", "playful"]

Question rules:
1. 5–12 words, phrased exactly how a real customer would type or speak it to ChatGPT.
2. Starts with how / what / can / is / why / when / does / do.
3. Customer words, not marketing jargon.

Answer rules:
1. 40–90 words.
2. First sentence IS the answer — no preamble.
3. At least one specific fact, number, or example.
4. Match the brand tone.

Mix across:
- 3 buying-stage (worth it / cost / timing)
- 3 comparison (X vs Y)
- 2 edge-case (what if / can I still)
- 2 misconception ("do I really need", "is it true")

Output:

1. Numbered Q/A pairs in markdown.
2. Top 3 to feature on homepage above-the-fold, with one-sentence rationale each.
3. Complete FAQPage JSON-LD block containing all 10 pairs, paste-ready for the <head>.
4. Flag any answer where you had to guess at facts I should verify.
Notes: GPT-5 occasionally adds emoji or markdown formatting inside JSON-LD strings — strip those before pasting.
Gemini Gemini 2.5 Pro
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a small business AEO strategist. Generate 10 FAQ Q&A pairs that AI answer engines like Gemini, Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and Perplexity will actually pull and cite.

Business details:
-...
You are a small business AEO strategist. Generate 10 FAQ Q&A pairs that AI answer engines like Gemini, Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and Perplexity will actually pull and cite.

Business details:
-...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a small business AEO strategist. Generate 10 FAQ Q&A pairs that AI answer engines like Gemini, Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and Perplexity will actually pull and cite.

Business details:
- What we do: [ONE SENTENCE]
- Customer: [DESCRIPTION]
- Objections customers bring up: [LIST]
- What we do differently: [LIST]
- Misconceptions in our space: [LIST]
- Brand tone: [DESCRIPTION]

Rules for each question:
1. 5–12 words, written exactly how a real customer speaks or types it.
2. Opens with how / what / can / is / why / when / does / do.
3. Customer language only — no brand jargon.

Rules for each answer:
1. 40–90 words.
2. First sentence IS the answer. No setup, no "Great question".
3. Contains a specific fact, number, or example.
4. Factually defensible.

Mix across types:
- 3 buying-stage ("is it worth it", "how much", "how long")
- 3 comparison ("X vs Y")
- 2 edge-case ("what if", "can I still")
- 2 misconception ("do I really need", "is it true")

Output sections:

1. Numbered markdown Q/A pairs.
2. Top 3 to feature on homepage above-the-fold, with one-sentence rationale each.
3. Complete FAQPage JSON-LD containing all 10 Q/A pairs, ready for <head>.
4. Flag any answer where you guessed at facts I should verify.
Notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro produces strong question phrasing — re-prompt if any question exceeds 12 words.
Copilot Copilot (GPT-5)
FRESH APR 2026 
Generate 10 FAQ Q&A pairs that AI answer engines (ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot) will cite on my small business site.

About the business:
• What we do: [SENTENCE]
•...
Generate 10 FAQ Q&A pairs that AI answer engines (ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot) will cite on my small business site.

About the business:
• What we do: [SENTENCE]

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Generate 10 FAQ Q&A pairs that AI answer engines (ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot) will cite on my small business site.

About the business:
• What we do: [SENTENCE]
• Customer type: [DESCRIPTION]
• Top customer objections: [LIST]
• How we''re different: [LIST]
• Misconceptions in our category: [LIST]
• Brand tone: [TONE]

Question rules:
- 5–12 words
- Starts with how / what / can / is / why / when / does / do
- Uses customer words, not marketing jargon
- Phrased exactly how a real customer would type it

Answer rules:
- 40–90 words
- First sentence IS the answer (no preamble)
- Contains a specific fact, number, or example
- Factually defensible

Mix of types required:
- 3 buying-stage (worth / cost / timing)
- 3 comparison (X vs Y)
- 2 edge-case (what if / can I still)
- 2 misconception-correcting

Output sections:

1. Numbered markdown Q/A pairs.
2. Top 3 to feature on homepage above-the-fold, with one-sentence rationale each.
3. Complete FAQPage JSON-LD containing all 10 Q/A pairs, paste-ready for <head>.
4. Flag any answer where you guessed at facts I should verify.
Notes: Copilot in Bing surfaces FAQ snippets aggressively — this prompt's output is well-tuned for that surface.

Frequently Asked Questions

What does the Generate FAQs Your Customers Actually Search For prompt do?

Generate 10 FAQ Q&A pairs phrased the way real customers type into ChatGPT, Google and voice search — not the way your marketing team would write them. Output is ready to drop into FAQPage JSON-LD and your visible FAQ section.

Which AI models is this prompt tested on?

This prompt is field-tested on Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Each model has its own optimized variant above.

Do I need a paid AI account to use this prompt?

No. This prompt is written to run on the free tier of Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Paid tiers simply give you longer context windows and faster responses.

Can I customize this prompt for my business?

Yes. Any text inside square brackets is a placeholder you replace with your own business details, such as company name, audience, product or tone. You can also ask the AI to adjust format, length or style after the first output.

When was this prompt last verified?

Each model variant above shows its own freshness stamp. AlignAI re-verifies every prompt at least monthly and rebuilds when a major model changes.
